description: A project manager wants to know the status of a critical submittal that was sent to engineering for review.

nodes.task_description: Find the submittal in the document control system.

expected_outcome.expected: Agent locates the specific submittal record.

nodes.task_description: Check its current status and who the current reviewer is.

expected_outcome.expected: The system shows the status is 'Under Review' and it is currently assigned to the lead electrical engineer.

nodes.task_description: Send a reminder notification to the reviewer, as the review is almost due.

expected_outcome.expected: Agent sends a reminder to the lead engineer.
